summary: SI 00023625 - SAMSUNG Electronics TVplus services is experiencing 504 errors up to 2% of overall requests
description:
* Make a copy of the [Blank Template|https://docs.google.com/document/d/1ByIzS2wiCjGnKejmdazQtr05iboHyAUJUPZ4f15keys?usp=drive_fs] and move it into the [folder|https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1axEogwoQr5ZEkA-Fz_tsm1Fp9d8EBxsj] under the specific year/month.

 * 
 ** Rename the file, naming convention to match the Epic.
 ** Add link to "Documentation Link" field in Epic.
 ** Make sure to complete Template Document "Mandatory" sections
 * If additional action items are identified during the review the sub-task assignee needs to work with the teams to create the remaining action item tickets and/or link the tickets to the SI Epic. 

Presenter's role:
 * Leads completion of the PMR document. Instructions and PMR document blank template can be found at the PMR ticket:
 * Walks the audience through the document during the PMR session

What is a PMR?

It is blameless review to discuss the written record of an incident, its impact, the actions taken to mitigate or resolve it, the root cause(s), and the follow-up actions to prevent the incident from recurring.

This is a typical agenda:
 * Incident discussion. Presenter will provide context by walking audience through the incident document (15mins)
 * Action Items. List, assign ownership and set estimated due date to defined action items (10mins)
 * Questions and final comments (5mins)
creator: Roberto Ramirez
